name: @secpal/android
description: SecPal Android Capacitor wrapper that reuses the shared frontend repository
author: SecPal

scripts.native:verify: test -f android/settings.gradle && test -f android/app/build.gradle && test -f android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml
scripts.cap:sync: npm run frontend:build && npx cap sync android && npm run native:normalize:cordova-config && npm run native:normalize:cordova-gradle
scripts.cap:copy: npm run frontend:build && npx cap copy android
scripts.cap:add:android: npx cap add android && npm run native:normalize:cordova-config && npm run native:normalize:cordova-gradle && npm run native:verify
scripts.fastlane:android:build:signed-apk: bash ./scripts/load-android-release-env.sh bundle exec fastlane android build_signed_apk
scripts.fastlane:android:build:signed-aab: bash ./scripts/load-android-release-env.sh bundle exec fastlane android build_signed_aab
scripts.fastlane:android:deploy:internal: bash ./scripts/load-android-release-env.sh bundle exec fastlane android deploy_internal
scripts.fastlane:android:deploy:internal:with-me: bash ./scripts/load-android-release-env.sh bundle exec fastlane android deploy_internal_with_metadata
scripts.fastlane:android:deploy:direct-apk: bash ./scripts/load-android-release-env.sh bundle exec fastlane android deploy_direct_apk
scripts.fastlane:android:deploy:direct-apk:beta: SECPAL_ANDROID_DIRECT_CHANNEL=beta bash ./scripts/load-android-release-env.sh bundle exec fastlane android deploy_direct_apk
scripts.fastlane:android:deploy:beta-apk: bash ./scripts/load-android-release-env.sh bundle exec fastlane android deploy_direct_apk_beta
